ops.title: P2: wire + daemon shell + trust spike
ops.description: wire.Framing/Server/Peer/NewLadder + lifeproto v1 + wiretest harness (plan §2); daemon.Peer/Health/Takeover/SkewWatch/IdleExit shell (§3/§5); trust.Policy DR-pinned fail-closed (§4) — trust implementation on fable (security-sensitive), LOCAL_PEERTOKEN + purego Security.framework spike with darwin&&cgo build-tag fallback (pure build fails closed under a configured Requirement). Signed-bundle E2E needs P0b. sol xhigh security review + second LOCAL_PEERTOKEN review.

ops.text: wire unit suites + cross-language lifeproto golden bytes (request AND response) green
Trust E2E vs signed fixtures: cross-team rejection, PID-reuse resistance, fail-closed with no verifier, unsigned-test-tag relaxation only under tag
sol xhigh security review + LOCAL_PEERTOKEN second review complete with findings dispositioned
